lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. The engine is reliable and has been regularly maintained. The exterior has a few minor scratches, and the interior shows light signs of use. All mechanical components are functioning as expected.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic imperfections but is generally well-maintained. The interior is clean with light signs of use on the upholstery. Mechanically, the car is sound and performs reliably.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, having been kept in a climate-controlled garage and meticulously detailed. The exterior paint is flawless, with no chips or scratches, and the interior remains in showroom state with no signs of wear on the upholstery. Every service has been performed on schedule at the dealership, and it runs perfectly. This is a rare find for a buyer looking for a car that looks and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. The engine runs poorly with significant leaks and a loud knock, and the transmission slips between gears. Cosmetically, there is extensive rust on the undercarriage and body panels, along with a heavily worn interior. It is not currently roadworthy and will require a tow.

Calling all restoration experts and parts seekers! This vehicle is ready for a complete overhaul and offers a fantastic opportunity for someone looking for a dedicated project car. While it’s currently in poor condition and needs significant mechanical and cosmetic attention, it's a budget-friendly way to get your hands on a classic frame or valuable components!
Fair condition.

Presenting an exemplary vehicle maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits pristine aesthetic condition and flawless mechanical integrity, consistent with a showroom-quality acquisition. Every detail reflects a rigorous commitment to preservation and premium care. We invite discerning buyers to inspect a vehicle that transcends standard market expectations and represents the pinnacle of its class.

Hey there! You guys have to see this absolute gem! Honestly, it's in such incredible shape, you'd think it just rolled off the showroom floor. I've babied this car from day one, and it's looking absolutely flawless inside and out. It's a super smooth ride and is totally ready for its next adventure. Message me if you want to come take it for a spin—you won't be disappointed!
Presenting a museum-grade 2002 BMW M3 (E46) finished in Titanium Silver. This example features the legendary S
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history included.

Offering a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This car presents in showroom-quality condition, having been meticulously garaged and maintained with an open-checkbook philosophy. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, dings, or paint imperfections, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin retains its original factory scent; the premium leather upholstery remains supple and taut without a single crease or sign of wear. Every technological feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance suite, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, featuring a spotless engine bay and a comprehensive service history documented at authorized dealerships. The tires are near-new, and the alloy wheels are entirely free of curb rash. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Serious inquiries only for this collector-grade example.

This exceptional vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to exacting standards and presented in immaculate showroom condition, it offers a peerless driving experience for the discerning collector. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to uncompromising quality. We invite you to inspect this investment-grade example of engineering excellence, which stands as a testament to superior care and mechanical integrity.

We are pleased to present this exemplary motorcar, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a specimen of distinguished caliber, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Meticulously serviced and stored in a climate-controlled environment, its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are absolute. This is, without reservation, one of the finest examples currently available on the market.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty to believe it. It's in truly pristine condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, and it's looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. If you're looking for a ride that's basically flawless and ready for an adventure, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin!

This 996.2 Carrera is a mechanically pristine specimen, featuring the high-revving 3.6L flat-six powerplant equipped with VarioCam Plus for optimized valve timing. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle and a factory-optioned limited-slip differential. Proactive maintenance includes a dual-row IMS bearing retrofit and a fresh rear main seal. The chassis dynamics are enhanced by Bilstein adjustable dampers, ensuring surgical turn-in and cornering stability. The braking system utilizes cross-drilled rotors paired with monobloc four-piston calipers for fade-free deceleration. This is a collector-grade example with a flawless service pedigree and zero deferred maintenance.
Mint condition. Low mileage. Garage stored. Original paint and interior. No mechanical issues. Clean title in hand.

Presented in absolute showroom condition, this vehicle has been meticulously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled garage since new. The exterior boasts a flawless factory finish with zero imperfections, while the interior remains in pristine state, featuring unmarked leather and that distinct new-car aroma. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, accompanied by a comprehensive service history from authorized specialists and all original documentation. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the precision-tuned engine, operates exactly as intended. This is a rare, collector-grade example that offers a driving experience indistinguishable from a brand-new model.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising quality. This vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard, preserved in showroom-grade condition both aesthetically and mechanically. Every detail reflects a commitment to excellence, offering the discerning driver a rare opportunity to acquire a definitive example of this model. We invite serious inquiries for this peerless acquisition.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This specimen has been maintained to the highest standards, exhibiting a flawless exterior and an interior that remains in showroom state. Mechanically superlative and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning enthusiast who demands perfection.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty! It’s in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied this car since day one, and it’s finally ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for something that's been loved and meticulously maintained, this is the one for you. Can't wait for you to take it for a spin!
This E46 M3 is a superlative example of BMW’s M-Division engineering, featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-
Garage kept. Original paint. No accidents. Full service history. Flawless interior. Mechanic inspected.

This pristine vehicle is a true collector's dream, maintained with obsessive care and stored in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish without a single swirl mark, scratch, or stone chip, while the original factory wheels remain completely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and retains its original factory scent, and every digital display and electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive, document-backed service history and a driving experience that remains as tight and responsive as the day it left the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a virtually untouched, investment-grade example of automotive excellence.

We are proud to present this masterfully preserved specimen, exhibiting showroom-grade aesthetics and uncompromising mechanical integrity. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire an investment-grade example in truly pristine, mint condition. Every detail reflects a legacy of meticulous care, ensuring a driving experience that remains as refined as the day it first left the assembly line.

We are proud to offer this exceptional vehicle, presented in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to the highest standards, this specimen exhibits a level of care that distinguishes it from the standard pre-owned market. From its flawless exterior luster to its pristine, factory-fresh interior, every aspect of this automobile reflects an uncompromising commitment to excellence. This is, without reservation, a premier example available for the most discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You've gotta see this absolute beauty. It's honestly in such amazing shape, you'd think it just rolled off the showroom floor yesterday! I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that's basically brand new without the new-car sticker shock, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin—I promise you'll fall in love!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered legend, featuring a high-revving 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a precision-matched 6-speed Getrag manual transmission. The mechanical synchronization is flawless; the dual-VANOS system has been professionally serviced, and the rod bearings have been addressed to ensure long-term reciprocating assembly health. The chassis remains rigid with a proactively reinforced rear subframe and a perfectly functional variable M-differential lock. Every suspension component, from the McPherson struts to the multi-link rear, maintains factory-spec geometry. This vehicle presents in a pristine state, retaining its original high-gloss finish and an interior free of bolster wear—a true turn-key analog performance machine for the serious collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included.

Offered here is an absolute gem, a vehicle that transcends the standard used car market. This specimen has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, appearing exactly as it did the day it rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster with zero swirl marks, rock chips, or imperfections, protected by a premium ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the premium leather seats are supple and free of any creasing, the dashboard is pristine, and the 'new car' scent lingers. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been maintained exclusively by certified specialists with a folder full of exhaustive service records. Every button, switch, and electronic feature operates with precision. This is not just a car; it is an investment-grade example for the most discerning collector who demands nothing less than perfection. No stories, no excuses—just an unparalleled

Presenting a masterfully preserved specimen that defines the standard for automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable mechanical integrity and a flawless aesthetic profile. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a truly peerless example of the marque.
